title: dendrolobium cephalotes
intro: Dendrolobium cephalotes, also known as the 'Coastal Buttonbush', is a shrub native to Australia, characterized by its compact growth habit and clusters of small, button-like flowers. The medicinal properties of Dendrolobium cephalotes lie in its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin irritations. Dendrolobium cephalotes can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and poultices, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
